meta.title: Russia's Demographic Crisis: Dimensions. Causes Implications
meta.description: Russia's demographic trends portend a crisis of alarming proportions for the country's future human and social capital, as explicated in grave detail in the National Bureau of Asian Research report Russia's Peacetime Demographic Crisis: Dimensions, Causes, Implications (May 2010) by Nicholas Eberstadt.  - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
